message:
fix(engine): boundary condition and overflow safety in 4 modules

Four targeted correctness fixes:

1. attestation_handshake.rs: Fix off-by-one in handshake window
   boundary check — exclusive upper bound was incorrectly treated
   as inclusive, allowing stale handshakes to pass validation.

2. hybrid_lane_router.rs: Change > to >= in lane capacity check,
   ensuring lanes at exactly their capacity limit are correctly
   identified as full rather than accepting one extra item.

3. sibling_integration_benchmark_gate.rs: Widen intermediate
   arithmetic from u64 to u128 before multiplication to prevent
   overflow when computing benchmark scores from large inputs.

4. proof_release_gate.rs: Same u64→u128 overflow fix for proof
   score computation, which multiplies two u64 values that can
   exceed u64::MAX in production workloads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
